title: SimpleNightmares
description: A mod that adds various sleep events to the game, including nightmares, vicious ambushes and the ability to set a sleep percentage/player amount to skip the night even if not all players are sleeping!
body:
A mod that adds various sleep events to the game, including nightmares, vicious ambushes and the ability to set a sleep percentage/player amount to skip the night even if not all players are sleeping!


This mod adds:
- The ability to set the percentage or amount of players that need to sleep to skip the night on servers. Now including wake up messages!

- A chance for the player to have a nightmare when sleeping. Nightmares give the player temporary debuffs.

- A chance for the player to get ambushed when trying to sleep. Dont sleep in the open!

- A new crafting material, Lunar Fragments. These are dropped by hostile mobs at night with a low chance. The drop chance scales with the moon phase, the chance is highest during a full moon!

- A Moon Lamp that the player can craft with these fragments and place near their bed to prevent nightmares and get a buff instead


**A lot of this mod is controlled in the config file! Please take a look in the config file of the mod when trying it out, as a lot of chances, effects and mobs are arbitrarily chosen as an example!**

Moon Lantern crafting recipe:

![Moon Lantern Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0166067cdddfc044f5c0816de8b2a58e5c0b4926.png)

GitHub: [https://github.com/KwemberDev/SimpleNightmares](https://github.com/KwemberDev/SimpleNightmares)

CurseForge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simplenightmares](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simplenightmares)
